LanguageData.MEC_BatchConvert_Desc: Instantly disintegrate all items currently stored on this building and convert them into electrical energy injected into the power grid.
LanguageData.MEC_ConvertLoaded_Desc: Disintegrate all items loaded into this converter's cargo container and convert them into electrical energy.
LanguageData.MEC_DirectConvert_Desc: Enter targeting mode. Click any item or building on the map to instantly disintegrate it and convert the matter into electrical energy.
LanguageData.MEC_NothingToConvert: Nothing to convert – the storage area is empty.
LanguageData.MEC_BatchConverted: Converted {0} item(s) into {1} Wd of electrical energy.
LanguageData.MEC_DischargeAll_Desc: Release all electrical energy stored in this converter's dedicated battery back into the power grid immediately.
LanguageData.MEC_DischargeAll_Confirm: Release all stored energy into the power grid? This cannot be undone.
